name: Hotel Lumière Paris
description: Located in the heart of Paris with stunning urban views. Nearby attractions include the Eiffel Tower (2.1 km), Louvre Museum (3.4 km), and Notre-Dame Cathedral (4.0 km).

name: Coral Blue Maldives Resort
description: Luxurious beachfront villa offering crystal-clear waters and private relaxation. Nearby wonders include Banana Reef (1.8 km), Manta Point (3.2 km), and Maldives Victory Wreck Dive Site (5.6 km).

name: Tokyo Serenity Inn
description: Modern Japanese-style hotel with excellent access to transit and culture. Nearby attractions: Tokyo Skytree (3.0 km), Senso-ji Temple (1.9 km), Akihabara District (2.6 km).

name: Goa Beachfront Retreat
description: Beachfront stay perfect for sunsets, nightlife, and relaxation. Nearby hotspots: Baga Beach (1.4 km), Aguada Fort (6.8 km), Anjuna Flea Market (3.2 km).

name: Alpine Frost Resort
description: A serene alpine retreat surrounded by mountains and snowy landscapes. Nearby attractions include Matterhorn Glacier Paradise (8.1 km), Gornergrat Railway (5.3 km), and Zermatt Village (2.9 km).

name: Manhattan Skyline Hotel
description: A premium hotel located in Manhattan with easy access to iconic attractions. Visit Times Square (0.9 km), Central Park (2.5 km), and the Empire State Building (1.8 km).

name: Golden Dunes Dubai Hotel
description: A luxurious hotel offering modern comfort and Arabian-inspired design. Nearby attractions include Burj Khalifa (3.8 km), Dubai Mall (4.2 km), and Jumeirah Beach (7.0 km).

name: Royal Bridge London Hotel
description: Classic British hospitality with a modern twist. Nearby icons include Big Ben (2.1 km), London Eye (2.7 km), and Buckingham Palace (1.8 km).

name: Marina View Singapore Hotel
description: A stylish stay located in the heart of the city. Close to Marina Bay Sands (1.7 km), Gardens by the Bay (2.3 km), and Orchard Road (3.8 km).

name: Harbour Lights Sydney Hotel
description: Bright and airy hotel offering harbour views and coastal charm. Nearby attractions: Sydney Opera House (2.4 km), Harbour Bridge (1.8 km), Bondi Beach (7.3 km).

name: Roma Heritage Suites
description: A historic hotel surrounded by Roman architecture and culture. Close to the Colosseum (1.9 km), Trevi Fountain (1.4 km), and Vatican City (4.3 km).

name: Bangkok Cityline Resort
description: A vibrant and modern stay near Bangkok’s highlights. Nearby attractions include Wat Arun (4.6 km), Chatuchak Market (7.8 km), and Grand Palace (3.2 km).

name: Pyramid View Cairo Hotel
description: A cultural escape overlooking ancient heritage sites. Nearby attractions: Pyramids of Giza (5.4 km), Egyptian Museum (7.0 km), Khan el-Khalili Bazaar (8.2 km).

name: Cape Horizon Seaside Hotel
description: A scenic getaway surrounded by nature and coastline. Nearby attractions include Table Mountain (4.1 km), V&A Waterfront (5.7 km), and Camps Bay Beach (6.4 km).

name: Taj Royale Stay
description: A peaceful stay near India’s most iconic monument. Close to Taj Mahal (3.1 km), Agra Fort (5.5 km), and Mehtab Bagh (4.2 km).
